title: Dual PD-1 and CTLA4 Immune Checkpoint Blockade and Hypofractionated Radiation in Patients With Advanced Salivary Gland Cancers.
abstract: No standard systemic therapy exists for recurrent/metastatic salivary gland cancer (R/M SGC). We explored the safety and activity of nivolumab and ipilimumab with palliative hypofractionated radiation (XRT) in this population.
